contests.title: Two Front Doors for Civitai
contests.description: Civitans! Civitai is splitting into two distinct experiences, one mainstream-friendly, one freedom-first, so both sides of the community can thrive. Nothing is lost, no new restrictions, just a clearer path forward. For more information, [read more!...](https://civitai.com/articles/28369)

contests.title: Civitai Memberships Announcment
contests.description: Coinbase Commerce, which until now powered Civitai.com Memberships, has been retired. Civitai.com Yellow Membership purchases are now temporarily unavailable. We’re working on a crypto deposit-based solution. In the meantime, Memberships via credit card are available on civitai.green for PG and PG-13 content creation. Yellow Buzz can still be [purchased](https://civitai.com/purchase/buzz) via the crypto-deposit method!
